title: senecio bollei
intro: Senecio bollei, also known as the 'Yellow Spur Geranium', is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio bollei include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Senecio bollei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
